mapper.select: SELECT type_name , par_issue_code , issue_code , project_name , title , priority , priority_code , issue_status , progress , created_at , started_at , due_at , resolved_at , assignee_code , assignee_name , duration , project_code , created_on , completed_on , project_status , type_level , parent_type FROM gantt_view ORDER BY issue_code
